name: Management Consulting Engagement Intake
description: Management consulting engagement intake for organizational diagnostic, strategy, and implementation mandates. Evaluates an engagement's problem definition, decision-maker access, scope boundaries, data availability, deliverable expectations, and team composition to produce a consulting engagement profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-engagement actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Consulting Engagement Profile
types.description: Generated consulting engagement profile from intake session data.
